message:
Add colored output to CLI commands using UI style system

Updates workers_list, workers_probe, daemon_status, and config_validate
to use the new Style API for consistent colored terminal output:

- Headers use styled format_header
- Key-value pairs use key/value/muted styling
- Status indicators use success/error/warning colors
- Info messages use info styling with symbols

This is part of the terminal colors visual polish initiative (nbo).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
